title: Talon (disambiguation)
content:
'''Talon''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Gus Talon]]''', a [[moon]] of [[Corellia]]
*The '''[[Silver Talons]]''', an embellishment of the [[Kalidor Crescent]]
*The '''''[[Steel Talon]]''''', an [[Imperial Navy]] [[Star Destroyer]]
*The '''''[[Iron Talon]]''''', a [[starship]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Talon Karrde]]''', a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]]
*'''[[Darth Talon]]''', a female [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] of the [[One Sith]]
*'''[[Matt Talon]]''', a light scout trooper in the [[First Sun Mobile Regiment]]
*'''[[Pel Talon]]''', a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] {{C|ambigously [[canon]]}}
*'''[[Sarasu Taalon]]''', a [[High Lord]] of the [[Lost Tribe of Sith]]

===Organizations===
*'''[[Gray Talon]]''', a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] organization
*The '''[[Talons]]''', a [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]] from the [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector]]
*'''[[Talon Squad]]''', a 9-man [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] squad
*'''[[Talon Squadron (New Republic)|Talon Squadron]]''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] starfighter squadron
*'''[[Talon Squadron (Galactic Empire)|Talon Squadron]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] heavy strike/starfighter support squadron

===Vehicles===
*'''[[Steel Talon/Legends|''Steel Talon'']]''', [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Conan Antonio Motti/Legends|Motti's]] personal [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]
*'''[[Talon (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Talon'']]''', an Imperial [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]]
*'''[[Talon (Imperial corvette)|''Talon'']]''', an Imperial [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]
*'''[[Talon (Rebel corvette)|''Talon'']]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] CR90 corvette
*'''[[Talon (Strike-class)|''Talon'']]''', a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]]
*'''[[Talon (warship)|''Talon'']]''', an Imperial warship active during the last days of the [[Thrawn campaign]]
*The '''[[Talon I combat cloud car]]''', an armed [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]]

===Other===
*'''[[Gus Talon/Legends|Gus Talon]]''', a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]
*The '''[[Silver Talons/Legends|Silver Talons]]''', an embellishment of the [[Kalidor Crescent/Legends|Kalidor Crescent]]

{{Disambig}}

|de=Talon
}}
